blocks.text: “O Lord Almighty, God of Israel, the soul in anguish and the wearied spirit cry out to you.
Hear, O Lord, and have mercy, for we have sinned before you.
For you are enthroned forever, and we are perishing forever.

O Lord Almighty, God of Israel, hear now the prayer of those of Israel who have died and of the children of those who sinned before you, who did not heed the voice of the Lord their God, so that calamities have clung to us.
Do not remember the iniquities of our ancestors, but in this crisis remember your power and your name.
For you are the Lord our God, and it is you, O Lord, whom we will praise.

For you have put the fear of you in our hearts so that we would call upon your name, and we will praise you in our exile, for we have put away from our hearts all the iniquity of our ancestors who sinned against you.
See, we are today in our exile where you have scattered us, to be reproached and cursed and punished for all the iniquities of our ancestors, who forsook the Lord our God.”
Hear, O Israel, the commandments of life;
Why is it, O Israel, why is it that you are in the land of your enemies,
that you are defiled with the dead,
You have forsaken the fountain of wisdom.
If you had walked in the way of God,
Learn where there is wisdom,
Who has found her place,
Where are the rulers of the nations
those who made sport of the birds of the air
those who schemed to get silver and were anxious,
They have vanished and gone down to Hades,
Younger people have seen the light of day
Their descendants have strayed far from their way.
She has not been heard of in Canaan
the descendants of Hagar, who seek for understanding on the earth,
O Israel, how great is the house of God,
It is great and has no bounds;
The giants were born there, who were famous of old,
God did not choose them
so they perished because they had no wisdom;
Who has gone up into heaven and taken her
Who has gone over the sea and found her
No one knows the way to her
But the one who knows all things knows her;
the one who sends forth the light and it goes,
the stars shone in their watches and were glad;
he called them, and they said, “Here we are!”
This is our God;
He found the whole way to knowledge
Afterward she appeared on earth
